title: revision_result
description: Structured revision output after critique (SPEC §7.9, §13). v1: minimal contract; Phase 0 stubs may append cosmetic text only.

run_id.description: Editorial run id (same as run manifest run_id, SPEC §12.1).

change_summary.description: What changed between draft and revision (SPEC §7.9).

unresolved_concerns.description: Material weaknesses not fully addressed (SPEC §7.9, §15.3); empty when none.
